long_description:
NRE were alerted of link between ngcs368.1.sr01.dal13 Et17/1 <-> ngas03.sr01.dal13 Et7/29/1 going down. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19719
short_description: ngcs368.1.sr01.dal13 Et17/1 <-> ngas03.sr01.dal13 Et7/29/1 | Link Down
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via one-touch automation.)
